name: btcagentic--project
description: The AI project manager that never forgets, never drops a task, and never lets a deadline sneak up on anyone. Break any goal into phases, tasks, and milestones. Track progress across people and teams without chasing updates manually. Surface blockers before they become crises. Generate status reports from actual work data instead of Friday afternoon fiction. Manage scope changes without losing control of the timeline. From a solo freelancer running three client projects to an enterprise team coordinating across departments — one conversation replaces an entire project management tool.
